import sys, json
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
import torch
from tsr.system import get_spherical_cameras
import predict

# Built-in one-view rays at default pose
ro, rd = get_spherical_cameras(1, 0.0, 1.9, 40.0, 256, 256)
idx = 128*256 + 128
print('builtin origin center', ro[0, idx].tolist())
print('builtin dir center', rd[0, idx].tolist())
print('builtin dot_to_origin', torch.dot(rd[0, idx], -ro[0, idx]).item())

# Our custom rays for equivalent spherical camera guesses
for az in [0, 90, 180, 270]:
    cams=[{'azimuth': az, 'elevation': 0.0, 'distance': 1.9}]
    ro2, rd2 = predict.cameras_to_rays(cams, torch.device('cpu'))
    print('custom az', az, 'origin', ro2[0, idx].tolist(), 'dir', rd2[0, idx].tolist(), 'dot_to_origin', torch.dot(rd2[0, idx], -ro2[0, idx]).item())

# Print imported util center direction to reveal z sign
try:
    dirs = predict.get_ray_directions(256, 256, 40.0)
    print('util dirs shape', tuple(dirs.shape), 'center', dirs[128,128].tolist())
except Exception as e:
    print('util dirs err', repr(e))
